prompt: Create a dashboard for the Settings section that should only be visible to admin users. It should display a heading 'System Info' and a placeholder paragraph. I want it in my existing Umbraco project at App_Plugins/SystemInfo/.
assertions: Manifest JSON has type set to 'dashboard'
Manifest JSON has a condition with alias 'Umb.Condition.SectionAlias' and match 'Umb.Section.Settings'
Manifest JSON has a condition with alias 'Umb.Condition.CurrentUser.IsAdmin'
Manifest conditions array contains exactly 2 condition objects
